commit.message:
Fix sky explorer drag: use consistent camera-frame projection

Replace north-up projectStarsTAN with camera-aware projectStarsCamera
(and vecToPixel) throughout the explorer. The new functions share the
same camera frame math as pixelToVec, making them true inverses.

Drag state now uses (P, R) — a unit vector for view centre and a roll
scalar — instead of (ra, dec, up). Each drag interval applies the
proven rotateByFromTo invariant from the fixed drag-start origin
(P0, R0) rather than accumulating incremental steps, eliminating drift.
Stars now stay locked under the cursor throughout a drag.

commit.message:
Add 6 Hex-Rays microcode tools for binary deobfuscation

Add get_microcode, get_microcode_block, nop_microcode,
install_microcode_optimizer, remove_microcode_optimizer, and
list_microcode_optimizers. These expose IDA's microcode intermediate
representation for reading, NOP-ing junk instructions, and installing
custom Python optimizer callbacks (instruction-level or block-level)
that run during decompilation.

Supports CFF removal, opaque predicate elimination, MBA simplification,
instruction substitution reversal, and dead code cleanup. 66 tools total.

fix: break admin redirect loop — separate auth vs authorization redirects

The security audit added isAdmin() to the admin layout, but it redirected
non-admin users to /admin/login. The proxy middleware then redirected
logged-in users back to /admin → infinite loop.

Fix: layout redirects non-admin users to "/" (home) instead of login page.
Proxy only redirects from login→admin for verified admin users.
Root cause: ADMIN_EMAILS env var missing from Vercel production.

downloadCalendarTemplate, onCalendarFileImport, onChecklistFileImport,
and downloadChecklistTemplate were checking typeof XLSX but never
calling loadXLSX() first. Now all 4 functions call await loadXLSX()
to lazy-load SheetJS from CDN before using it. SW v41.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: use full git ref as URL path to avoid loader cache collision

When loading two git revisions of the same file (e.g. origin/main:openapi.yaml
and HEAD:openapi.yaml) with the same openapi3.Loader, the loader's visitedDocuments
cache keyed both by the same URL "openapi.yaml", causing the second load to return
the cached first spec. This produced empty changelog/diff output.

Fix by using the full git ref as the URL path so each revision gets a unique cache
key. As a bonus, relative $refs within a git-loaded spec now resolve to paths that
isGitRevision recognises, enabling correct recursive git-revision loading.

Add a regression test that loads two revisions of the same file with a shared
loader and asserts they contain distinct content.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(ci): refresh dependencies after SDK builds in Dockerfile

When bun install runs initially, the SDK's dist/ folder doesn't exist
(.dockerignore excludes it). The SDK's exports field points to dist/
files, causing Vite to fail resolving @fluxbase/sdk during admin build.

Solution: Run `bun install` again after building SDKs to refresh the
symlinks and ensure proper package resolution.

* Fix Phase B folder rename breaking log path and scope

Two bugs in the post-connection folder rename (Phase B):
1. After renaming the folder, $script:logFilePath still referenced the old
   folder path, so the subsequent log file rename failed with "path not found"
2. The $assessmentFolder update was local to the function scope and never
   propagated back to the main script, breaking all subsequent file operations

Fix: Update $script:logFilePath to the new folder path before renaming the
log file. Use $script:assessmentFolder to propagate the renamed path back
to the main script scope.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix report filename not getting domain prefix and remove stale header paths

- Report filename derivation only checked DefaultDomain, which is often a
  vanity domain (e.g., dz9m.com). Now also scans VerifiedDomains from the
  tenant CSV for the onmicrosoft domain when DefaultDomain doesn't match.

- Remove Output/Log path display from the startup header banner. These
  showed pre-rename paths that became stale after Phase B renamed the
  folder, which was confusing. The final summary already shows correct paths.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Simplify report domain prefix: write to log header, read in report

Instead of the report independently scanning VerifiedDomains from CSV
(fragile with vanity domains), the main script now writes `Domain:`
to the log header and Phase B updates it after Graph resolves.
The report reads it the same way it reads Cloud and Version.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Add domain suffix to _Assessment-Summary CSV filename

Summary CSV now follows the same naming pattern as the log, report,
and issues files. Report generator uses wildcard to find it.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Update Invoke-M365Assessment.ps1

fix: downgrade Next.js 16 to 15.5.12 to resolve MIDDLEWARE_INVOCATION_FAILED

Next.js 16 deprecated middleware in favor of "proxy", causing runtime
failures on Vercel. Downgrade to 15.5.12 where middleware works natively.

- reactCompiler moved to experimental config (Next.js 15 format)

commit.message:
feat: add KapiSpeaker with lip-synced Rive animation and emotion controls

Implements a full lip-sync character system using Rive direct-blend mix inputs:
- KapiSpeaker component: Rive animation driven by BlendStateController (emotions)
  and LipSyncController (visemes via rAF + binary search)
- BlendStateController: smooth crossfade between any two emotion states (eye/mouth)
  using per-state 0–100 mix inputs, with optional snap for instant jumps
- LipSyncController: frame-accurate viseme sync using audio.currentTime + lookahead offset
- visemeMapper: German character-to-viseme alignment from ElevenLabs timestamps
- Pre-generated phrase audio + viseme JSON served from /static/speech/
- TTS API route for dynamic speech generation with alignment
- /kapi debug route for testing all animation controls
- speakPhrase restores previous eye/mouth state after speaking instead of
  always resetting to neutral
- Add eslint.config.js flat config to fix ESLint v9 compatibility

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add natural language compound search with attribute auto-detection (v0.9.0)

Search now auto-detects style/material/color/shape/mood/size keywords from
posmap_scores and combines with text search. Includes 70+ Korean synonyms
(나무→목재, 철→금속 etc.) and visual attribute tags below search input.
